sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int8, value Nullable(String), num Int32, created_at DateTime);
SELECT id, defaultValueOfArgumentType(value), defaultValueOfArgumentType(num) FROM test_table WHERE defaultValueOfArgumentType(value) < 'a';
SELECT id, defaultValueOfArgumentType(value) AS def_val FROM test_table WHERE def_val < defaultValueOfArgumentType(num);
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR (value < defaultValueOfArgumentType(1));
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY defaultValueOfArgumentType(num) HAVING COUNT(*) < defaultValueOfArgumentType(num);
SELECT id, AVG(num) AS avg_num FROM test_table GROUP BY defaultValueOfArgumentType(value) HAVING avg_num < defaultValueOfArgumentType(200);
SELECT a.id, b.value FROM test_table a JOIN test_table b ON a.num < defaultValueOfArgumentType(b.num) WHERE defaultValueOfArgumentType(a.value) < defaultValueOfArgumentType(b.value);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, num FROM test_table WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
